steps.title: Use the parallel slope
steps.content: The line $y=8x+2$ has slope $8$. A parallel line has the same slope, so the new line also has slope $8$.

steps.title: Use the given intercept
steps.content:
The line passes through $(0,6)$, so its $y$-intercept is $6$. Therefore, its equation is
$$y=8x+6$$The answer is B.
